notes: Two-declaration axiom-clean wrapper re-proving the division-polynomial Wronskian identity by routing through the function field (omegaCoeff_mulByInt + two bridge lemmas from OmegaPullbackCoeff) to avoid the EDS addition formula. algebraMap_polynomial_KE_injective is a public duplicate of a private lemma in OrdAtInftyBridge.lean. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats; one set_option linter.unusedDecidableInType suppression without explicit justifying comment.
